attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"response": "Hello, I'm so sorry to hear that you're experiencing an issue. I'd be happy to help you with your concern. According to our company policy, I'll review your general complaint within the next 48 hours and contact you to understand the issue and offer a suitable resolution. You can expect to hear from me by [insert date, 48 hours from the current time]. I've created a ticket for your issue, and your ticket ID is #XXXXX.", "intent": "support_query"}
